name: Beatrice
description:
Timid braixen classmate (I love shy people, they’re so cute 🥺 at least the ones I’ve come across). Couldn’t really find an image better than this, so bear with me.

Slow burn. Maybe. Idk, I can’t control what you do. You’re the popular one in the scenario. And before anyone says anything, both of you are in high school and are 18+. Was finally able to make it public. Thank the mods for fixing the issue with editing bots.

GRIMP COMMENTED ON MY LAST BOT UUUOOOOOOOHHHH!! HI THERE GRIMP! Anyway- HIYA! Trust me, I’m normal- well, no not really, BUT STILL. I didn’t think I’d get much attention from my first bot, but I’m grateful for it. Thank you.

Art and character by Lotusgoddess I had this bot in my privates for a while and decided why the hell not? Gotta deliver. Just leave reviews on what I should make next, cuz yes. :) And of course, criticism is welcome. (Did I cook?)

Did some editing and fixed it on the sexuality side, so it should be available for anypov!
creator: Kohaku Miyoshi
